summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SilkRoute bilingual MVP platform. All backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend fully functional with excellent bilingual support, responsive design, and proper integration with backend services.
passed_tests: Backend API root endpoint (200 OK)
Admin login with admin@silkroute.com (JWT token generated)
Member login with test@silkroute.com (JWT token generated)
User registration with new test user (200 OK)
GET /api/groupages returns 3 groupages (200 OK)
GET /api/groupages/{id} returns single groupage details (200 OK)
GET /api/groupages/{id}/pricing returns pricing with savings calculation (200 OK)
GET /api/admin/stats returns user/groupage counts with admin token (200 OK)
GET /api/admin/warnings returns alerts with admin token (200 OK)
Unauthorized admin access properly blocked (403 Forbidden)
Invalid login credentials properly rejected (401 Unauthorized)
Landing page loads with hero section and proper branding
Language toggle FR/EN works correctly - all text changes
Groupages list page displays 3 groupages with proper cards
Progress bars show correct completion percentages (20%, 75%, 60%)
Filter buttons work (Tous, Ouvert, Fermé, Terminé)
Search functionality with proper French placeholder
Navigation bar with language toggle, login/signup buttons
Login page displays with Google OAuth and email/password form
Responsive design and proper styling throughout
Supplier information with Gold status badges
Time remaining and spots left indicators working
Product categories properly displayed (Beauty, Textiles, Electronics)
